implemented_contracts: FastAPI exposes configured CORS origins for browser saved-view requests
Dedicated live Playwright config starts FastAPI and Next.js with NEXT_PUBLIC_EEI_API_BASE_URL
Live E2E API bootstrap resets the local E2E PostgreSQL database, runs migrations, seeds catalogs and loads synthetic fixtures before starting uvicorn
Live browser E2E uses two independent browser contexts against the same FastAPI/PostgreSQL saved-view record
Session one creates server saved-view version 1, session two updates the same saved view to version 2, and session one receives a stale-version 409 when saving from version 1
Frontend conflict recovery UI fetches the latest server saved view and reports server-conflict-resolved
remaining_to_close_a207: Record GitHub Actions verify-g2-db PASS for the live multisession E2E
Add user/workspace authn/authz boundary before public multi-user deployment
